texto: Folks can't carry around money in their pocket. They've got to go to an ATM machine, and they've got to pay a few dollars to get their own dollars out of the machine. Who ever thought you'd pay cash to get cash? That's where we've gotten to.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Bill Janklow que provoca temas ligados a negocios. Ao questionar “Folks can't carry around money in their pocket. They've got to go to an ATM machine, and they've …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre negocios, thought, you, com foco em you e cash.

frase_original: Folks can't carry around money in their pocket. They've got to go to an ATM machine, and they've got to pay a few dollars to get their own dollars out of the machine. Who ever thought you'd pay cash to get cash? That's where we've gotten to.
